description: SQL injection vulnerability in tr.php in DownlineGoldmine Special Category Addon, Downline Builder Pro, New Addon, and Downline Goldmine Builder allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the id parameter.  NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
